cards.title: 1. Reliability
cards.content: The ability to perform the promised service dependably and accurately. (e.g., Doing what you promised).

cards.title: 2. Responsiveness
cards.content: Willingness to help customers and provide prompt service. (e.g., Replying to calls/emails quickly).

cards.title: 3. Assurance
cards.content: Employees' knowledge, courtesy, and ability to convey trust and confidence.

cards.title: 4. Empathy
cards.content: Caring, individualized attention given to customers. (Putting yourself in their shoes).

cards.title: 5. Tangibles
cards.content: Physical facilities, equipment, and appearance of personnel. (Since insurance is intangible, documents must look professional).

cards.title: IGMS (Integrated Grievance Management System)
cards.content: An online portal launched by IRDAI. It acts as a central repository for industry-wide consumer grievances.

cards.title: Consumer Courts (CPA)
cards.content: Three-tier system: District Commission, State Commission, and National Commission. Used when customers are dissatisfied with the service.

cards.title: Insurance Ombudsman
cards.content: Created by the Government. Resolves complaints out of the court system efficiently and impartially.

items.text: Who can approach? Any person who has a grievance against an insurer.
Complaint must be made within 1 YEAR of the insurance company rejecting the complaint.
Maximum compensation awarded by Ombudsman cannot exceed ₹30 Lakhs.
There is NO FEE charged for filing a complaint with the Ombudsman.
The Ombudsman's decision is binding on the insurer, but NOT binding on the customer.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Quick Memory)
items: Active Listening is the most important communication skill for an agent.
Insurance is an 'Intangible' product. You are selling a promise.
CLV (Customer Lifetime Value) is the historical and future revenue expected from a customer.
If a customer's complaint is not resolved within 15 days by the company, they can go to the Ombudsman.
Ombudsman has 1 month to give a recommendation, and 3 months to pass an award.
